title: Define cancellation-safe radio TX handoff
description: Python LinkLayer retains a queued frame when Radio.transmit is cancelled, but SimRadio may already have sent TX_FRAME and be awaiting TX_DONE. Retrying can duplicate airtime and consume a stale simulator response. Define the Radio transmit cancellation/commit contract and make simulator and hardware adapters preserve protocol synchronization. Discovered reviewing convergence commit d422a03b; requires architecture beyond frozen conflict reconciliation.
